title: Hide Artifacts
description:
Hides wearable artifacts from the Artifacts mod by the author ochotonida.

No need to hide it by itself. Hides from first-person view and other's people artifacts also
body:
An additional resourcepack for [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts), hiding all 3D models of each artifact, which is worn as a trinket

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DzMiwfIj/images/d4cc833072fc71014e8f2a5939175a23250e6099.png)
